programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: One of Stan's colleagues is about to marry the Inspector's niece - but first he has to survive the stag night. Vintage comedy, starring Reg Varney(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: The Annual Busmen's Ball arrives, and Jack arranges a stripper as part of the entertainment. Comedy, starring Reg Varney and Bob Grant(n)

programme.title: Rising Damp
programme.desc: Rigsby jumps to the conclusion that Philip has bought him the kind of curvaceous Christmas cracker every man dreams of, but, as usual, his happiness is short-lived. Vintage 1975 seasonal special, starring Leonard Rossiter, Don Warrington, Richard Beckinsale and Gay Rose(n)

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: Part one of two. Primrose falls for a roofing contractor, while the twins prove too much of a handful for their school, prompting a trip to view the facilities on offer at Brockhurst College. Nostalgic comedy drama, starring David Jason and Pam Ferris(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A mysterious delivery causes Poirot to recall the time his supper at a Buenos Aires restaurant was rudely interrupted by the murder of a fellow diner, who unwittingly drank from a glass laced with cyanide. Drama, starring David Suchet and Philip Jackson(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Abandoned by his wife and faced with financial ruin, local farmer Richard Harvey finally reaches the end of his tether, and heads into Aidensfield to air his grievances in a particularly memorable way. Meanwhile, the arrival of a handsome stranger sets Gina's heart racing - but he could be a dangerous criminal. Vernon and David branch out into a new line of business, and soon manage to pep up a few palates with Aunt Beth's tangy horseradish sauce(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Zoe asks Frank to stop drinking, and when Kim confronts him at the stables, he has some horrifying news for her. Meanwhile, Lorraine moves back in with her mum(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Eric's car gets repossessed, Rachel is asked to look after Robert and is aghast when he falls in the river. Joe tries to encourage Kim to go to the Woolpack(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Curly is stunned when Elaine catches Vera shoplifting, and she tells Jack that she did not know what she was doing. Elsewhere, Derek is in agony(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Alma is aghast when Mike considers sending Mark to Eton. Liz enjoys flirting with Colin, Maureen shows an interest in Ted's old house, and Andy cooks Amy a meal(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A masterpiece by landscape artist Henry Hogson causes a stir when it is auctioned for £400,000 after a fierce bidding war - and hours later, its former owner is tortured and killed. When a Hogson work is then stolen, Barnaby and Jones research the Midsomer painter with the help of art teacher Matilda Simms. They soon uncover evidence of forgery - but the killer is still at large. Guest starring David Bamber and Susannah Harker, with John Nettles and Jason Hughes(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Abandoned by his wife and faced with financial ruin, local farmer Richard Harvey finally reaches the end of his tether, and heads into Aidensfield to air his grievances in a particularly memorable way. Meanwhile, the arrival of a handsome stranger sets Gina's heart racing - but he could be a dangerous criminal. Vernon and David branch out into a new line of business, and soon manage to pep up a few palates with Aunt Beth's tangy horseradish sauce(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica attends a seminar in Australia and learns that she may have an inheritance claim to a piece of land there that has traditionally been used for sheep grazing. Angela Lansbury stars(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The detective is ordered to take a holiday for the benefit of his health, and with Hastings and Miss Lemon in tow, reluctantly heads for the tranquillity of Devon's coast, where his relaxation is soon ruined by the discovery of a socialite's murdered body on the beach. Several people had reason for wishing Arlena Stuart dead, but high on the list of suspects are her husband, teenage son and a troubled vicar. David Suchet, Hugh Fraser, Philip Jackson and Pauline Moran star(n)

programme.title: Unforgotten
programme.desc: Nicola Walker and Sanjeev Bhaskar return as detectives Cassie and Sunny, investigating another emotionally charged cold case. When the body of a teenage girl who went missing at the turn of the millennium is found at a building site off the M1, four old schoolfriends are placed under the spotlight and their relationships are tested to the limit. With Alex Jennings, Kevin R McNally, Neil Morrissey and James Fleet(n)

programme.title: Unforgotten
programme.desc: Cassie and Sunny go in search of Hayley's family as the press begin to take an interest in the story. A detective who was involved in the original investigation offers his thoughts on why her disappearance remained unsolved, pointing out that Hayley's boyfriend was suspected of the crime but was never charged. The distance between where Hayley was last seen and where her body was found leads Cassie to form a new theory - that the killer may have travelled up from London, then returned before they could be questioned(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Stan and Jack are chosen to go on a training course. Comedy, starring Reg Varney and Bob Grant(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Denise is upset that to Hanif she is nothing but a bit of fun. Curly is annoyed when Reg alters the lunch rota so he can be with Maureen(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Denise turns to Don for comfort, Brendan invites Deirdre for a drink after work, and Steve and Liz are alerted to the break-in and check the house to see what has been taken(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Dr Tricia Summerbee tries to get back to normal following her near-fatal heart attack, despite Mike's concerns that she has returned to work too soon. Elsewhere, Ventress investigates a murder in the village - and gets a shock when the prime suspect turns out to be a thief he certified dead more than 15 years earlier. Jason Durr, Clare Calbraith and William Simons star(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica is on hand to help a puppet designer when he runs into difficulties with his own creations - but after a security guard is killed, she finds herself on the trail of a murderer. Detective drama, guest starring Malcolm in the Middle's Bryan Cranston, with Angela Lansbury(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Stan injures his foot in the bath and worries he will no longer be able to drive. However, conductor Jack is ready to offer plenty of good advice. Comedy, starring Reg Varney(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Stan's spirits are lifted by the arrival of a beautiful new waitress. Comedy, starring Reg Varney(n)

programme.title: Rising Damp
programme.desc: Rigsby invests in some new furniture in a desperate attempt to impress Ruth's replacement, Brenda, but makes the mistake of opting to pay for it on the never-never. Leonard Rossiter and Gay Rose star(n)

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: Part one of two. Pop befriends a pilot he rescues from his crashed plane, but suspects he is being drawn into a smuggling racket when the family is invited to a celebratory champagne night on the town. Drama, starring David Jason(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: An archaeologist dies of a heart attack shortly after smashing the seal of an ancient Egyptian tomb, raising the spectre of the mummy's curse. The grieving widow summons the Belgian sleuth to unravel the mystery, but he can only smoke out the real villain by risking his own life. David Suchet stars, with Anna Cropper and Bill Bailey(n)

programme.desc: It is Christmas morning and Lorraine if feeling neglected. Jack apologises to Leonard, and Frank is speechless when Kim gives him a picture instead of the watch as a gift(n)

Fortunately, a vacationing Poirot - who shares with most great detectives an inability to go on holiday without stumbling over a body or two - is on hand to investigate. Mystery, starring David Suchet, with Ron Berglas, Georgina Sowerby and Iain Mitchell(n)

programme.title: ITV3 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: After Mavis tells him he is getting fat, Derek takes up jogging. Elaine alerts Curly to the high shoplifting rate at the store, and he offends the staff by searching their bags(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Alf puts an offer in on the bungalow, Jack wants to enter a talent contest at the Queens, and Derek is told to rest for a week(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: The County Sheepdog Trials take place at Ashfordly Hall, and it soon becomes clear that even such a prestigious event can bring out the worst in some people. Meanwhile, Vernon tries to cash in by organising the toilet facilities for the event - but his money-making dreams soon go down the pan(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica is called in to investigate the case of a deputy sheriff accused of murdering a businessman against whom he held a grudge - and soon finds there is more to it than meets the eye. Angela Lansbury stars(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: One of Stan's colleagues is about to marry the Inspector's niece - but first he has to survive the stag night. Vintage comedy, starring Reg Varney(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: The Annual Busmen's Ball arrives, and Jack arranges a stripper as part of the entertainment. Comedy, starring Reg Varney and Bob Grant(n)

programme.title: Rising Damp
programme.desc: Rigsby jumps to the conclusion that Philip has bought him the kind of curvaceous Christmas cracker every man dreams of, but, as usual, his happiness is short-lived. Vintage 1975 seasonal special, starring Leonard Rossiter, Don Warrington, Richard Beckinsale and Gay Rose(n)

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: Part one of two. Primrose falls for a roofing contractor, while the twins prove too much of a handful for their school, prompting a trip to view the facilities on offer at Brockhurst College. Nostalgic comedy drama, starring David Jason and Pam Ferris(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A mysterious delivery causes Poirot to recall the time his supper at a Buenos Aires restaurant was rudely interrupted by the murder of a fellow diner, who unwittingly drank from a glass laced with cyanide. Drama, starring David Suchet and Philip Jackson(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Abandoned by his wife and faced with financial ruin, local farmer Richard Harvey finally reaches the end of his tether, and heads into Aidensfield to air his grievances in a particularly memorable way. Meanwhile, the arrival of a handsome stranger sets Gina's heart racing - but he could be a dangerous criminal. Vernon and David branch out into a new line of business, and soon manage to pep up a few palates with Aunt Beth's tangy horseradish sauce(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Zoe asks Frank to stop drinking, and when Kim confronts him at the stables, he has some horrifying news for her. Meanwhile, Lorraine moves back in with her mum(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Eric's car gets repossessed, Rachel is asked to look after Robert and is aghast when he falls in the river. Joe tries to encourage Kim to go to the Woolpack(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Curly is stunned when Elaine catches Vera shoplifting, and she tells Jack that she did not know what she was doing. Elsewhere, Derek is in agony(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Alma is aghast when Mike considers sending Mark to Eton. Liz enjoys flirting with Colin, Maureen shows an interest in Ted's old house, and Andy cooks Amy a meal(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A masterpiece by landscape artist Henry Hogson causes a stir when it is auctioned for £400,000 after a fierce bidding war - and hours later, its former owner is tortured and killed. When a Hogson work is then stolen, Barnaby and Jones research the Midsomer painter with the help of art teacher Matilda Simms. They soon uncover evidence of forgery - but the killer is still at large. Guest starring David Bamber and Susannah Harker, with John Nettles and Jason Hughes(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Abandoned by his wife and faced with financial ruin, local farmer Richard Harvey finally reaches the end of his tether, and heads into Aidensfield to air his grievances in a particularly memorable way. Meanwhile, the arrival of a handsome stranger sets Gina's heart racing - but he could be a dangerous criminal. Vernon and David branch out into a new line of business, and soon manage to pep up a few palates with Aunt Beth's tangy horseradish sauce(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica attends a seminar in Australia and learns that she may have an inheritance claim to a piece of land there that has traditionally been used for sheep grazing. Angela Lansbury stars(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The detective is ordered to take a holiday for the benefit of his health, and with Hastings and Miss Lemon in tow, reluctantly heads for the tranquillity of Devon's coast, where his relaxation is soon ruined by the discovery of a socialite's murdered body on the beach. Several people had reason for wishing Arlena Stuart dead, but high on the list of suspects are her husband, teenage son and a troubled vicar. David Suchet, Hugh Fraser, Philip Jackson and Pauline Moran star(n)

programme.title: Unforgotten
programme.desc: Nicola Walker and Sanjeev Bhaskar return as detectives Cassie and Sunny, investigating another emotionally charged cold case. When the body of a teenage girl who went missing at the turn of the millennium is found at a building site off the M1, four old schoolfriends are placed under the spotlight and their relationships are tested to the limit. With Alex Jennings, Kevin R McNally, Neil Morrissey and James Fleet(n)

programme.title: Only When I Laugh
programme.desc: Norman's head is turned by a pretty nurse, but he is not the only one to have taken a shine to her. Medical sitcom set in the ward of an NHS hospital, starring James Bolam, Richard Wilson and Peter Bowles(n)

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: An engineer hatches a plan to immortalise people by freezing them and bringing them back to life, and decides Simon Templar would make the ideal guinea pig(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Two brothers end up killing a priest at a Catholic school when a truck hijack goes wrong. The case proves embarrassing for the cops, since Crocker was giving a lecture at the time(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: The medical examiner fears a genetically engineered virus may be on the loose following the death of a hospital patient and those who came into contact with her(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur's car lot is threatened with closure, spurring him to enter the cut-and-thrust world of local politics to have more of a say in local issues. Comedy drama, starring Dennis Waterman, George Cole and Lennard Pearce, best remembered as Grandad in Only Fools and Horses(n)

programme.title: Cycling: Vuelta a Espana
programme.desc: Action from the 21st and final stage of the Grand Tour race, which consisted of a 106.6km route from Fuenlabrada to Madrid. Gary Imlach presents, with reports from Daniel Friebe and commentary by Ned Boulting and David Millar(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle are trained to act as bodyguards to a Middle Eastern president who is preparing to sign an important peace treaty. Meanwhile, two killers are receiving similar training to prepare them to assassinate him. As their paths cross, the CI5 operatives learn the would-be killers have some useful inside information and share more in common with them than they may have imagined(n)

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Templar is asked by the former king of Fedyra to accompany him on an important mission in Switzerland, where he becomes aide to a queen(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Theo investigates the murder of a plastic surgeon shot dead in his car, and arrests a drug dealer - only to find that the victim was already dead when the gun was fired(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: The LA punk rock scene comes under the spotlight when a teenage boy is murdered in a club while dancing to lyrics about death and violence(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur is captivated by an attractive female vocalist, who boasts limited musical talent. Nevertheless, he uses his contacts to secure a gig for her at a club run by a dodgy entertainment manager, and soon both he and Terry find themselves immersed in the seedier side of the showbiz industry during a night's work in a disco. Comedy drama, starring Dennis Waterman and George Cole(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle's country holiday with their latest girlfriends spirals into chaos when they are held hostage in a farmhouse by two gunmen who have just botched a robbery. Adventure, with Gordon Jackson, Lewis Collins and Martin Shaw(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A Scottish detective on the trail of a gang of crooks requests help, and the squad resolves to catch his quarry. However, it becomes apparent that the visiting sleuth is holding back some important information that Regan and his colleagues need to know. TV presenter Janet Ellis features in a supporting role(n)

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as four contestants pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught(n)

programme.title: Speed Freaks
programme.desc: After months of preparation, Zef Eisenberg and his team attempt to break the flying mile record at Pendine Sands. They have tripled the horsepower of a Porsche Turbo S, but plagued by mechanical problems and with bad weather looming, it still promises to be a difficult challenge(n)

programme.title: Benidorm
programme.desc: The Dawsons continue to speculate about Cyd's motives, but Rob pops the question anyway, while both Kenneth and Callum have romantic entanglements. Joyce appoints Monty as the new Entertainments Manager at the Solana and he plans a magical evening at Neptunes(n)

programme.title: Firefox (1982)
programme.desc: A former US Air Force pilot comes out of retirement for a top-secret mission - to go undercover behind the Iron Curtain and steal a hi-tech Soviet fighter plane that is invisible to radar and equipped with a thought-controlled weapons system. Cold War action adventure, directed by and starring Clint Eastwood. With Freddie Jones, David Huffman and Warren Clarke(n)

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Templar visits Venice to save a damsel in distress - only to find himself plunged headlong into a seedy underworld of gangsters, intrigue and deadly revenge. Roger Moore plays the suave secret agent, with William Sylvester, Patrick Troughton and Lois Maxwell(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: A murderer plays twisted mind games on the emotionally fragile woman who saw him disposing of the body, in the hope of driving her to suicide. Guest starring William Katt (Carrie)(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: A hostage is shot during an attempted armed robbery at a bank - and Quincy gets the job of defending the policeman who pulled the trigger(n)

programme.desc: Arthur and Terry rescue Greek-Cypriot Charlie from a beating and learn that his cousin is being threatened by another relative who wants to take over their restaurant. programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie's sanity is questioned when he becomes preoccupied with a gang of Hell's Angels and puts his life in jeopardy by taking part in a motorbike race to the death. Drama, starring Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan and Carter track down those responsible for killing a driver and injuring a policeman while making off with vehicles carrying brandy on two separate occasions. Carter's new girlfriend, rookie cop Julie Kingdom, pursues a known fence and recovers the brandy. However, when Regan wants to take the credit, he and Carter come to blows. John Thaw and Dennis Waterman star(n)

programme.title: Die Another Day (2002)
programme.desc: James Bond is suspended from duty after being taken hostage in North Korea, but goes against orders to track down those who betrayed him. During the pursuit of the terrorist he was investigating before his capture, he discovers a connection with a British billionaire who has constructed a devastating orbital weapon. Spy adventure, starring Pierce Brosnan, Halle Berry, Toby Stephens, Judi Dench and John Cleese(n)

programme.title: Total Recall (1990)
programme.desc: A construction worker pays to have fake memories of a dream holiday implanted into his brain, but discovers his mind has already been tampered with - apparently to erase his true identity as a secret agent from a colony on Mars. He journeys to the planet in search of the truth, but is drawn into a conflict between the tyrannical ruler and a rebel faction. Paul Verhoeven's sci-fi thriller, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Rachel Ticotin and Michael Ironside(n)

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Templar is called in to help a Russian physicist who wants to defect to America. Vintage adventure, starring Roger Moore, with Guy Deghy, Anthony Booth and Yootha Joyce(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: A detective with a drink problem is demoted to a beat cop, but his determination to make amends for his past mistakes leads him to get in the way of Theo's murder investigation(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: A police officer is killed while listening in on a deal between the Yakuza and the Mafia. Quincy's sidekick Sam investigates, but finds himself getting deeper into trouble himself(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Bearer bonds go missing from gangster Bobby Altman, and suspect Billy Gilpin appears at Arthur's house wanting to get out of town. Terry drives him to a hotel, but when Altman finds out he believes Arthur is involved and tries to establish the truth. George Baker and Roy Kinnear guest star(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: An amnesiac woman delivers a garbled message about an attack on a diplomatic meeting planned for the following day. She later regains her memory and tells Bodie and Doyle her employers were abducted by the same gunmen who intend to carry out the action. Gordon Jackson, Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins star(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A member of a group of convicts slips off the roof and dies during a robbery. The apparent leader of the gang appears to be having doubts about his life and Regan senses he is deliberately pointing clues in a desire to be caught during his next job. John Thaw and Dennis Waterman star(n)

programme.title: Rugby World Cup's Greatest Tries
programme.desc: Martin Bayield takes a look back at some of the tournament's most memorable tries, including New Zealander John Kirwan's effort against Italy in the first-ever World Cup match back in 1987, his compatriot Jonah Lomu terrorising England in 1995, and Jason Robinson's try for the English to help them defeat Australia in the 2003 final(n)

programme.title: Lethal Weapon (1987)
programme.desc: An unstable Vietnam veteran cop teams up with a by-the-book Los Angeles police detective to investigate the apparent suicide of the daughter of a wealthy businessman, leading them to a violent and bloody confrontation with a ruthless drug cartel under the control of a retired US general. Action thriller, starring Mel Gibson, Danny Glover, Gary Busey, Mitchell Ryan and Tom Atkins(n)

Comedy drama, starring Dennis Waterman and George Cole(n)

programme.title: Hoarders: Buried Alive in My Bedroom
programme.desc: Observational documentary taking a look at a selection of people whose homes are extremely cluttered due to hoarding. Those featured include Sally from the Midlands, whose flat has already been cleared by the local council once before. In north London, 40-year-old Faye has become overwhelmed by her compulsive shopping. Unable to say no to a bargain, she has filled her flat to capacity, even though this includes keeping hold of piles of food that went out of date seven years ago(n)

programme.title: Inside
programme.desc: Fiona Phillips explores the inner workings of the famous retailer, and looks at how, as the retail market has changed, the brand has struggled in recent years, falling out of the FTSE Top 100. With a £750 million investment in food delivery service Ocado, Fiona explores whether customers loyal to other outlets can be persuaded that it is worth paying more to make M&S their regular food shop(n)

programme.title: The Abused
programme.desc: Documentary telling the stories of Hazel and Kelly, who suffered physical abuse at the hands of their partners in Norfolk, following the police investigations into the crimes. At 45, Hazel thought she had found love, and tried to ignore the warning signs when her partner became increasingly controlling and violent. But then she was brutally attacked, with her abuser punching her and stamping on her head with reinforced boots. At first, Kelly denied her husband's behaviour to the police. It took several more attacks before she finally told the truth about his controlling and coercive nature, and his emotional and physical abuse(n)

programme.title: McDonald's vs Burger King: Burger Wars
programme.desc: Documentary examining how the fast food giants grew from humble origins to become two of the most recognisable brands in the world. The programme assesses the chains' marketing ploys and promotional techniques, while vloggers and food critics compare the rivals' most notable products and the ways in which they are presented. Industry insiders also reveal the secrets behind both chains' success and how they see off the competition(n)

programme.title: Tulsa (1949)
programme.desc: A cattle magnate's ambitious daughter alienates her friends with her single-minded pursuit of wealth as she attempts to fend off the unwanted attentions of greedy oil barons intent on stealing her land. Drama, starring Susan Hayward, Robert Preston, Pedro Armendariz and Lloyd Gough(n)

programme.title: 12 Angry Men (1957)
programme.desc: Twelve jurors convene to decide the verdict in a murder trial. While 11 of the group are thoroughly convinced the teenage defendant is guilty, one lone voice of reason refuses to cave in to pressure and passionately argues the case for his innocence. Sidney Lumet's legal drama, starring Henry Fonda, Lee J Cobb, Ed Begley, Martin Balsam and Jack Klugman(n)

programme.title: Legend of the Lost (1957)
programme.desc: A grizzled adventurer living in Timbuktu is hired to escort a mysterious explorer across the Sahara desert in search of a fabled lost city. A local woman joins the men on their quest, but when the trio reach their destination the explorer reveals his plan to betray his companions and leave them high and dry. Adventure, starring John Wayne, Sophia Loren and Rossano Brazzi(n)

programme.title: Bear Island (1979)
programme.desc: UN scientists gather on a remote island in the Arctic, where they find a Nazi hoard of gold bullion in the wreck of a U-boat. However, the discovery brings a series of unexplained accidents and mysterious deaths in its wake. Thriller based on Alistair MacLean's novel, starring Donald Sutherland, Vanessa Redgrave, Richard Widmark and Christopher Lee(n)

programme.title: Fantastic Four: Rise of the Silver Surfer (2007)
programme.desc: The super-powered team takes on a mysterious alien who has been sent by his planet-eating master to prepare Earth for obliteration. While the four heroes try to find a way to foil its plans, an old enemy returns, intent on seizing the extraterrestrial's power. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Ioan Gruffudd, Michael Chiklis, Chris Evans and Jessica Alba, with the voice of Laurence Fishburne(n)

programme.title: The Last Stand (2013)
programme.desc: Disgraced narcotics cop Ray Owens retires into a quiet life as sheriff of a small town on the Mexican border. He gets the chance to prove his worth as a law enforcer when a drug lord escapes from prison and tries to flee the US - with his escape route taking him through Ray's jurisdiction. Action thriller, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Johnny Knoxville and Forest Whitaker(n)

programme.title: Maze Runner: The Scorch Trials (2015)
programme.desc: The children who escaped from an isolated community at the centre of a mysterious labyrinth find themselves in a desolate wasteland. As they seek the truth about the organisation that imprisoned them, they face a series of terrible dangers. Sci-fi adventure based on the second of James Dashner's series of novels, starring Dylan O'Brien and Kaya Scodelario(n)

programme.title: Martha Marcy May Marlene (2011)
programme.desc: A woman is subjected to abuse while a member of a cult, but manages to escape and seeks refuge with her sister. She finds it difficult to make a fresh start as she is consumed with paranoia. Traumatic memories keep flooding back, and she finds it hard to tell the difference between reality and her nightmares. Thriller, starring Elizabeth Olsen, Sarah Paulson and John Hawkes(n)

programme.title: Buchanan Rides Alone (1958)
programme.desc: A drifter rides into a town dominated by the members of a ruthless family. He befriends a Mexican in jail for killing a man who attacked his sister and tries to save him from the gallows, getting caught up in the evil clan's running internal conflicts in the process. Western, starring Randolph Scott, Craig Stevens, Manuel Rojas and Barry Kelley(n)

programme.title: The Ladykillers (1955)
programme.desc: A criminal mastermind and his gang come up with a cunning scheme to steal a fortune, but their plan is threatened by the unsuspecting elderly landlady of the boarding house they are staying in. They decide to dispose of her, which proves easier said than done. Classic Ealing comedy, with Alec Guinness, Peter Sellers, Herbert Lom, Katie Johnson, Cecil Parker, Danny Green and Jack Warner(n)

programme.title: Last Train from Gun Hill (1959)
programme.desc: A marshal discovers the man responsible for raping and killing his wife is actually the son of an old friend, setting the scene for a showdown. Western, starring Kirk Douglas, Anthony Quinn, Brian Hutton and Carolyn Jones(n)

programme.title: Master of the World (1961)
programme.desc: A Victorian hot air balloon expedition is captured by the captain of a hi-tech airship who intends to use his craft to bring about world peace by destroying military installations across the world. Sci-fi adventure based on Jules Verne's novels, starring Vincent Price and Charles Bronson, with Henry Hull and Mary Webster(n)

programme.title: Snow White & the Huntsman (2012)
programme.desc: An evil queen learns that her reign will last for ever if she kills a princess, so sends a renowned warrior to find and murder her. However, he comes to realise his mistress's evil ways, and instead trains his intended victim to fight so they can bring the tyrant's rule to an end. Fantasy adventure, with Kristen Stewart, Chris Hemsworth and Charlize Theron(n)

programme.title: Arrival (2016)
programme.desc: The world is thrown into uproar when 12 alien spaceships arrive at locations around the globe. As tensions rise between nations and fear of the arrivals grows, a recently bereaved linguist is recruited by the US army to find a way to communicate with the aliens and discover why they have come. Sci-fi drama, starring Amy Adams, Jeremy Renner and Forest Whitaker(n)

programme.title: Lost & Found (2017)
programme.desc: Comedy drama following seven interconnecting stories set in and around a lost and found office at an Irish train station. Written, directed by and starring Liam O Mochain, with Norma Sheahan Moya and Brendan Conroy(n)

programme.title: Oldboy (2013)
programme.desc: A man is kidnapped and held hostage for 20 years, until one day he is mysteriously released. Determined to avenge himself on his captors, he investigates a web of sinister conspiracies to discover who it was that imprisoned him and why. Spike Lee's remake of the Korean thriller, starring Josh Brolin, Elizabeth Olsen and Samuel L Jackson(n)

programme.title: Sorry, Wrong Number (1948)
programme.desc: Rich, neurotic Leona Stevenson lies bedridden at home and is trying to phone her husband. But the lines are crossed, and she accidentally overhears a call in which two men are planning a murder. She frantically tries to raise the alarm, and when at last she manages to convince the telephone company of her story, she comes to realise with increasing horror who their intended victim is. Thriller, starring Barbara Stanwyck, Burt Lancaster, Ann Richards and Wendell Corey(n)

programme.title: Support Your Local Sheriff! (1969)
programme.desc: A drifter in need of money takes the job of sheriff in a small mining outpost, and chooses the town drunk to be his deputy. Events take a chaotic turn when a family of influential crooks decides to pull out all the stops to do away with the lawman. Comedy Western, starring James Garner, Joan Hackett, Jack Elam, Bruce Dern and Walter Brennan(n)

programme.title: Sea of Sand (1958)
programme.desc: Allied troops fighting in North Africa in 1943 are redeployed as saboteurs behind enemy lines to blow up Rommel's desert fuel dumps. A clash of personalities between officers initially causes problems, but the men overcome their differences to work together. Second World War adventure, starring Richard Attenborough, John Gregson, Michael Craig and Vincent Ball(n)

programme.title: The Colditz Story (1954)
programme.desc: A medieval castle in Germany is turned into a PoW camp during the Second World War, and used to house the most rebellious Allied prisoners, all of whom have made repeated escape attempts. Although breaking out is supposedly impossible, the determined inmates refuse to be beaten and continue their bid for freedom. Second World War drama, starring John Mills and Eric Portman(n)

programme.title: Tomorrow, When the War Began (2010)
programme.desc: Seven Australian teenagers return from a camping trip in the wilderness to find that while away, their country has been invaded by a hostile foreign power and their families sent to prison camps. They form a resistance group to fight a guerrilla campaign against the occupying forces. Action adventure, starring Caitlin Stasey, Rachel Hurd-Wood and Lincoln Lewis(n)

programme.desc: Lennox secretly dates her teaching assistant, and when Joe and Mel find out, they try to put an end to the relationship - only things do not go according to plan. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Bonnie thinks that Danny and Ben buying the bar is a bad idea and uses underhand tactics to sabotage their plans. Riley takes Tucker's damage lawsuit to court but finds out too late that the case is based on falsehoods. Comedy, starring Melissa Peterman and Jean-Luc Bilodeau(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: In a bid to sabotage Riley and Ross' blossoming relationship, Ben urges her kindhearted boyfriend to take part in a strenuous athletic competition. Bonnie is also in competitive mood because she wants to play poker with the boys - despite Tucker's strong opposition. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Holt allows Santiago and Peralta to house-sit for him while he visits Kevin in Paris, but mayhem ensues when Holt's beloved dog, Cheddar, goes missing on their watch. A romantic fling between Adrian Pimento and Diaz disrupts life at the precinct, disgusting their co-workers(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Terry tackles an old case with Jake's help to prove his mettle to his old precinct, while Adrian becomes Charles' new roommate and Amy goes on a difficult training exercise with Holt and Rosa(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly confronts her husband after discovering her engagement ring is the same one Murray gave to his former fiancee. Assisted by Pops, Adam looks to a romantic comedy film for inspiration when trying to capture the attention of his attractive neighbour. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam abandons Pops to go trick-or-treating with some new friends, but he gets a shock when he discovers what they are really planning. programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: Hollyoaks

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is invited to visit the Large Hadron Collider in Switzerland and asks Penny to join him as a Valentine's Day treat. However, Sheldon tries to persuade the couple to allow him to take her place(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon misses an opportunity to meet Spider-Man co-creator Stan Lee when he has to go to court for driving through a red light, and his anger leads to his imprisonment. Penny finds out the address of the comic-book writer and takes Sheldon there - but his troubles with the law have yet to reach their conclusion and the visit does not go as expected(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun

With their budget of £350,000 Scarlette Douglas shows them five stunning villas on the Algarve in Portugal(n)

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer go head to head as they meet fed-up families whose homes no longer fit their requirements. After listening to their issues, Phil tries to persuade the owners to sell and upgrade on the property market, while Kirstie argues that investing, either by extending or redesigning, is the wiser move. In the first programme, Paul and Dawn, their three children, and his twin 17-year-old daughters from a previous relationship, find their current home isn't working for them any longer. While Kirstie suggests a complete overhaul, Phil is doing what he does best and finds a selection of alternative properties(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick, Angel and the family move into their crumbling chateau, which they find they will be sharing with bats, birds and thousands of flies(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Radio presenter Guy is the first dinner party host in and around Brighton, hoping his musical and Mexican-themed menu and an air guitar competition will be a hit(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is the second day in and around Brighton, and bubbly 26-year-old Emma is hosting a beach-themed dinner party in the hope of winning the £1,000 cash prize(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dutch pilot Tim hosts the third night of the competition in and around Brighton, and takes full advantage of his worldly travels with a menu comprised of international dishes(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Day four in Brighton sees shy personal trainer Hannah giving her guests a saucy surprise - and then one of the diners upsets the others by adding his own condiments to the meal(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The final night of competition in and around Brighton, sees 50-year-old love doctor Monti try to cast his spell over his guests in an attempt to win the £1000 cash prize. While Monti tries to spread the love, Tim really puts his foot in it as his compliment to Hannah gets well and truly lost in translation(n)

programme.title: Ugly House to Lovely House with George Clarke
programme.desc: Darren and Hannah from Heathfield, East Sussex, want to redesign their bungalow on a budget of £45,000, so George Clarke introduces the couple to award-winning architect Carl Turner. He proposes a radical revamp, to be done in stages as finances allow. But with another baby on the way, Darren is keen for the family to get the most space possible now. With money running out and the roof leaking, will the refurb be completed in time for the new arrival?(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Chester Zoo's penguins move into a temporary home while a new luxury home is built for them, but the move becomes upsetting when malaria sweeps the colony, with elder Rudd battling to survive against the odds. Meanwhile, the African painted dog pups venture out of their den for the first time, but the runt of the litter Mosi refuses to go out into the cold, and keepers worry she may have issues with her eyesight. Elsewhere, Sumatran orangutan Emma gives birth, and a beetle with a wonky horn has to fight other bachelors in the group to win the attention of a female.(n)

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Rescued bulldog Dolly is having trouble with all four legs, police dog Anya's spine has been badly damaged, and a retired greyhound called Lola has a mystery problem. 'Bionic Vet' Noel Fitzpatrick does what he can to help them at the pioneering veterinary practice(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets Spanish architect Jaime and his wife Mimi as they embark on a mission to convert a Grade II listed folly into a family home in Buckinghamshire. Giving themselves a wildly optimistic six month deadline to finish before the birth of their second child, it's not long before the couple hit trouble. Jaime puts all his energies and creativity into the project, using innovative 3D mapping to squeeze living spaces into the tower, but it proves to be an exhausting struggle(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY

programme.title: Ugly House to Lovely House with George Clarke

The makeshift kitchen is an accident waiting to happen. The living room is dark and dingy and misaligned windows are not doing anything for its kerb appeal. Enter architect Carl Turner, who has a modest budget of £80,000 to transform this monstrosity. Can he create a contemporary, spacious and adaptable home for this rapidly growing family?(n)

programme.title: The World's Most Beautiful Railway

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Scarlette Douglas comes to the aid of brothers Dave and Richard Paine, who are looking for a home in Portugal's Algarve that can serve as a winter retreat for their parents, but could also be used by their families for holidays throughout the rest of the year(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun

Jasmine Harman shows them five properties for their £100,000 budget(n)

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Emma and Nigel Forde and their three boys have lived in their Essex house for the past seven years, but after a bad experience with a bathroom fitting they have let the maintenance of the family home slide, which means broken kitchen doors and some rather unusual curtains. Nigel thinks it's time to wave the white flag and sell up, but Emma wants some real investment to turn around the house she loves. Kirstie Allsopp has plenty of refurbishment ideas, while Phil Spencer has already found some viable replacement homes to buy. Will the Fordes decide to stay or go?(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The fourth to host in Surrey is 56-year-old music teacher Caroline, who hopes an evening of singing, dancing and nursery rhymes will increase her chances of bagging the money(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Ugly House to Lovely House with George Clarke
programme.desc: George is joined by leading architects to help transform some of Britain's most unloved houses into desirable properties. In the village of Claverdon, Warwickshire, Steve and Celine's are embarrassed by their 1960s A-frame house. Having remained untouched for nearly 50 years, it is stuck in a time warp and is falling apart at the seams. George Clarke enlisted the help of architect Graeme Williamson to drag the house into the 21st century and make it fit for a family of five. Steve and Celine already have their own ideas - but can Graeme convince them to buy into his ambitious architectural vision?(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo

Matt Tebbutt is in Germany to investigate a new type of yoghurt that claims to be full of fibre, but doesn't have any bits in it(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Bev Cameron has multiple sclerosis and finds that a warm climate helps her manage her symptoms. As a response, she has decided to buy a property near the historic harbour town of Paphos, in Cyprus. programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo

Meanwhile, silvery gibbon Alvin is keen to get close to his partner Tilu again, and after diving headfirst into an empty pool one too many times, keepers decide a trip to the vet is in order for caiman lizard Gary to see if there is an underlying problem. programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A Russian blue cat is brought into the surgery with a shattered jaw after a dog attack, and a man living in a homeless shelter brings in his best friend Spud, a Labrador cross with a lame back leg. Plus, Noel tries to help straighten a deformity in a six-month-old Chihuahua puppy's leg(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Gallery owner Elinor and fitness entrepreneur Born set themselves the task of creating Britain's first hypoallergenic house in a leafy back garden plot in south west London. Driven by the need to alleviate their two young sons' life-threatening allergies, their new part-submerged, shed-inspired home, will be constructed using low toxin materials and deploy cutting-edge filtration systems to clean the air they breathe. Will their innovative new house deliver the benefits Elinor and Born are hoping for?(n)

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson and James May take a look at increasingly popular tall hatchbacks known as crossovers. Having concluded their primary appeal is to caravanners, the duo spend a couple of days in models by Mazda and Volkswagen and try to get a feel for what life is like for the people they believe would buy one. Meanwhile, Richard Hammond drives a pair of exciting Lamborghinis in Italy - the ferocious Aventador Roadster and the limited-edition Sesto Elemento, which carries an eye-watering price tag of around £2million. Two cars are also put through their paces on the test track, with James in a modern re-creation of the classic Porsche 911 and Aerosmith frontman Steven Tyler in the rather less exotic Reasonably Priced Car(n)

programme.title: Walter's War
programme.desc: Drama based on the life of Walter Tull, a black professional footballer who enlists in the Army during the First World War. programme.title: Time Team Specials
programme.desc: Tony Robinson explores the Dorset Ridgeway and investigates how the discovery of burial grounds, prehistoric monuments and a town built on top of an Iron Age hill fort have made the area one of the richest archaeological sites in the country. The team also explains how scientific advances have helped shed light on Britain's prehistoric civilisations(n)

programme.title: Time Team Specials
programme.desc: Tony Robinson and Mick Aston look back at clips from the first 18 series of the archaeology programme, and reveal how their discoveries have helped build a picture of the development of human life in Britain during the past 10,000 years. They explain how early Britons learned to control the land they lived on, and explore how the evolution of house-building helped change the way people lived(n)

programme.title: Wild Africa
programme.desc: The wildlife of Africa's green belt, an area spanning 5,500km from Uganda in the east to Sierra Leone in the west, which is hotter, brighter and wetter than anywhere else on the continent, allowing plants to flourish. programme.title: Time Team
programme.desc: Tony Robinson and the team embark on their 200th dig, examining the bed of a reservoir in a valley high up on Dartmoor in Devon. Their efforts are further rewarded with the discovery of the first stone henge in Britain for a century(n)

programme.title: The Great Hotel Escape
programme.desc: Steph and Dom catch up with a hotelier in North Wales, Jake juggles renovation plans with running a fully-booked hotel, and a heating problem strikes James and Fjona's manor hotel(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to La Grange, a suburb of Chicago, to help the owners of Cafe 36, an upmarket bistro threatening to destroy the marriage of its owners due to the scale of their financial losses. The head chef's attitude to quality control is driving customers away, and it is up to Gordon Ramsay to turn the business around(n)

programme.title: Britain at Low Tide
programme.desc: Palaeobiologist Dr Tori Herridge and her team of experts explore the north coast of Kent around Whitstable. The programme takes a look at the excavation of one of the most significant shipwreck discoveries of recent times, the origins of a strange sandbar, and a forgotten military base in an unusual location which proved pivotal in deciding the outcome of the First World War. Plus, a look at how rising sea levels and coastal erosion mean that a great deal of archaeology may be lost before it can be documented(n)

programme.title: Hidden Britain by Drone
programme.desc: Tony Robinson presents a second series of the programme that uses drones to shoot aerial footage of areas of Britain that are off limits to the public. In the first episode, he dispatches flying cameras to explore an abandoned theme park, an immense stately home and underground wine vaults belonging to billionaires. The programme also examines the secrets that Argos conceals from the eyes of its customers and contains footage of a flower farm in full bloom, which is closed to the public for 50 weeks of the year(n)

programme.title: The World's Most Luxurious Airline
programme.desc: While leading airlines battling it out for the number one spot as the world's most luxurious flyer, this documentary reveals the exacting standards first-class passengers expect when wining and dining in the skies - with Michelin-style food, limitless champagne, and a deluxe first-class suite for the super wealthy. With exclusive access to Singapore Airlines, the film reveals the lengths the airline goes to building a first-class suite for the super wealthy, spending $850m over the course of four years(n)

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig host Dairy Week, with Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood judging the baker's efforts. The first of the three challenges is a decorative signature bake that involves a tricky turn-out. The bakers then move onto the technical challenge, which is a complex recipe with a long history that dates back to Henry VIII. With the first day behind them, the contestants regroup for the final challenge of the week - an intricate showstopper usually found at the centre of Indian weddings(n)

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: Documentary set inside Wood Green animal charity. A two-year-old Pomeranian called Bear arrives at the centre, rescued from a life spent caged on a puppy farm. Can Bear learn to trust again and win the hearts of a family looking for a dog? Meanwhile, Knobby the Chihuahua puppy tries to charm his way into the affections and home of couple Alex and Kier(n)

programme.title: The Rob Rinder Verdict
programme.desc: Guests Katherine Ryan and Big Narstie join in the fun as the criminal barrister-turned-host applies his extensive know-how to take a swipe at the news in his own inimitable way(n)

programme.title: Treasure Island with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: Four days in, and the contestants are struggling. There's £100,000 hidden in the jungle, waiting to be found, but the group are busy battling sleep deprivation thanks to an insect infestation. Plumber Jack wrestles a potential meal from the grip of a python, and crisis hits when the islanders realise there is a major issue with their water supply(n)

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Andy Wiederhorn, CEO of Los Angeles-based fast food restaurant Fatburger, goes incognito among his employees in order to learn more about his business that has evolved from a late-night hangout for musicians in the 1950s to an international success story(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week comes from the Family Tree in Whatstandwell, Derbyshire, where owners Charlie and Sam Cameron want their guests to feel like part of the family(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Fitness fanatic Claire Wier hosts the first party in Worcestershire and hopes her low-fat menu and pre-dinner exercise routines are enough to secure her the £1,000 prize. However, her guests are disappointed that the evening meal is lacking in cream, fat, oil and butter(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Beauty pageant queen Pippa Langhorne throws the second party in Worcestershire, and hopes to impress her fellow diners with a sophisticated Midsummer Night's Dream-themed event. However, her starter fails to win the approval of shellfish-hating Claire Wier, and Tim Lawson disapproves on the basis of his friendship with fish. Everyone is surprised as the hostess brings out an unusual dessert, and a guest appearance by her singing dog Buddy rounds off a memorable evening(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Publican Tim Lawson hosts the third dinner party in Worcestershire, laying on a country-themed evening featuring a novel take on prawn cocktail and a creamy main course. Chris Sheppard finds himself confronted about his tan, while tension mounts between Pippa Langhorne and Claire Wier, who takes issue with her fellow diner's claims to have a white bread allergy(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Teresa Cox hosts the fourth dinner party challenge from Worcestershire and sets her store on wooing the guests with a lobster starter and an extravagant main course. The menu seems to go down well with the diners, but when the conversation turns to the paranormal there are mixed reactions(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Chris Sheppard hosts the final dinner party in Worcestershire, throwing a black-tie-themed evening. He impresses some of his guests with his home-made sweet chilli sauce and potato towers - although Claire Wier finds the presentation pretentious - before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes the group to The Royal Hotel in Sheerness, Kent, where partners Sarah Lewry and Gareth Segrove believe they offer great value for money(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Drive It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Sam Lovegrove unearth an American Centaur scooter, which folds away into a suitcase. If they can get it going, Henry hopes to take it on holiday(n)

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: President of Moe's Southwest Grill, Paul Damico, goes undercover to check the standards he values are still being met. The company is one of the world's fastest growing restaurant chains with 10,000 employees and Paul wants to look for opportunities to assist his staff in a similar way to how his family were helped by his father's bosses during his childhood(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef comes to the aid of Anthony Trobiano, whose restaurant in Great Neck, New York, is failing even though his partner's parents have given him their life savings and he has taken out half a million dollars in loans. Gordon has some harsh criticism about the unhygienic kitchen and the quality of the food being served, but the owner has trouble accepting his advice(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray and Debra are shocked to realise they have virtually nothing to talk about except the kids, and resolve to take more of an interest in each other's hobbies(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray is disturbed to learn Michael and Geoffrey are playing fairies in the school play, especially as they chose the roles themselves. American comedy, starring Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton, Sullivan Sweeten and Sawyer Sweeten(n)

programme.desc: Martin dispenses advice to a depressed Kenny, leaving Frasier feeling jealous, and a yoga class goes badly for Niles, who is taken aback to discover he is not as supple as Daphne. Guest starring Alan Cummings(n)

programme.desc: The Crane brothers are delighted when their social standing grows thanks to a Russian caviar dealer, who offers them good quality roe at knock-down prices. Daphne tries to persuade a reluctant Martin to return $40 dispensed in error by a cash machine(n)

programme.title: Crime and Punishment
programme.desc: The work of various sections of the criminal justice system - police, probation, prison, prosecution and parole - all coping with difficult cases and managing risk with limited resources. The first edition follows the story of 28-year-old Paul Bousell, who faces the prospect of lingering in jail until his death. He is serving a controversial IPP sentence, or Imprisonment for Public Protection, which has been labelled by MP Ken Clarke 'a stain on the criminal justice system'(n)

programme.desc: Halvbar goes in search of a shooting star, but finds it is nothing but a worthless rock. However, Vic works out that it may have very useful magnetic properties(n)

programme.title: Vic the Viking

programme.desc: Martin unfairly accuses Golden Eye of stealing his hat and Nils of eating all the berries(n)

programme.desc: The boys must save Lotus Blossom, who has been transformed by a magic spell, and repel an invasion of giant insects(n)

programme.title: Tashi

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life(n)

programme.title: Coach Trip
programme.desc: The tourists arrive in Valencia, where a new couple rouse the group's curiosity as they participate in a paella-making class. Later, Brendan Sheerin takes them for a bungee jump with a difference(n)

programme.title: Coach Trip
programme.desc: The tourists visit Benidorm, where Brendan takes the group circus training before they spend the afternoon jet skiing. Later on, emotions run high at the vote and there is a surprise in store for the passengers(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Suffolk couple Helen and Geoff Molyneaux go house-hunting in South Africa's idyllic Wineland's region in the hope of realising their dream of owning a retreat in the area(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: A glamorous globetrotter has her heart set on a retirement property in warmer climes and plans to relocate with her sister to South Africa's Garden Route. The only cloud on Cornwall-based Alma Scholes' horizon is having to leave behind her beloved Great Dane(n)

programme.title: Property Ladder
programme.desc: Homeowners work to increase the value of their properties, redesigning and refurbishing for maximum profits(n)

programme.title: Nuremberg - Nazis on Trial
programme.desc: Dramatisation of the trial of Hitler's deputy, Rudolf Hess, the third in line to leadership of Nazi Germany, who was declared insane by the Fuehrer after making an unexpected errand of peace to Britain in 1941. The senior Nazi's fitness to stand trial was at the centre of his case in the tribunal. Narrated by Matthew MacFadyen and starring Ben Cross as Hess(n)

programme.title: Operation Cupid (1960)
programme.desc: Comedy, starring Charles Farrell as a Cockney wide boy running a struggling matrimonial agency. When a wealthy widow turns up looking for a husband, he sees the chance to become rich by posing as a South African millionaire and romancing her himself. With Avice Landone and Wallas Eaton(n)

programme.title: Macbeth (1997)
programme.desc: A general in medieval Scotland is told by three witches that he is destined to become king, so plots to murder the current monarch and seize the throne. However, once he has taken the crown he is consumed by paranoia, and goes to terrible lengths to ensure his reign continues. Shakespeare's tragedy, starring Jason Connery and Helen Baxendale(n)

programme.title: The Coronation of Queen Elizabeth II
programme.desc: Documentary charting the historic events of June 2, 1953, when the Queen became the 39th sovereign to be crowned at Westminster Abbey. What happened behind the scenes is explored through diaries, letters and government papers, as well as rare film footage and photographs, and there are also interviews with historians and experts on royal ceremonies. The programme reveals that Her Majesty's apparent calmness during the Coronation contrasted with organisers' last-minute nerves as the BBC mounted its most ambitious television broadcast to date, amid the concerns of prime minister Winston Churchill(n)

programme.title: London Live News
programme.desc: News headlines, travel, weather and debate from across the capital(n)

programme.title: Britain's Biggest Primary School
programme.desc: Documentary chronicling life at Gascoigne Primary School in Barking, east London, following the pupils, parents and staff. The first episode looks at how the school manages with such a high turnover of often vulnerable pupils, including 10-year-old Viktor, who has just arrived from Bulgaria and cannot speak English. Lee, also 10, has moved from Norfolk after the death of his mother and is disrupting classes to get attention, while newly qualified teacher Kevin McNally has to cope with a class that is constantly changing(n)

programme.title: Three Steps in the Dark (1953)
programme.desc: A wealthy eccentric invites all the members of his family to his country house, so he can discuss the contents of his Will. However, when he is suddenly killed, everyone present is a suspect. Murder mystery, starring Greta Gynt and Hugh Sinclair(n)

programme.title: Panorama
programme.desc: Peter Taylor investigates the rising number of lone wolf terror attacks targeting civilians, travelling to the US to talk to the FBI's deputy director and going on patrol with the NYPD. He asks what the UK Government can do to prevent radicalisation of young people and talks to Britain's most senior anti-terror police officer about what authorities here are doing to protect the public in the face of this growing threat(n)

programme.title: Warrior Challenge
programme.desc: MMA & K1 from the Troxy in London title fight Mihai Zmarandescu vs Alfie Hawes plus Erol Raif vs George Zorilov, Kat Freeman vs Kat Twardowska(n)

programme.title: Danny Dyer's Real Football Factories
programme.desc: Danny Dyer continues his examination of football hooliganism, focusing on clubs in the North, including Leeds United and Sheffield Wednesday(n)

programme.title: Essex Heist (2017)
programme.desc: A mechanic struggling to make ends meet hears that a large sum of money is being transported through the area, so he and his friends plot to steal it. However, their lives end up on the line when they discover they have just unwittingly robbed a ruthless gangster. Crime thriller, starring Glenn Salvage and Georgia Annable(n)

programme.title: Monique (1970)
programme.desc: A French au pair is hired to look after an unhappy couple's children, and ends up sleeping with both parents, enlivening their dull sex lives. When the couple find out the truth, they consider a threesome to spice things up even further. Drama, starring Sibylla Kay, David Sumner and Joan Alcorn(n)

programme.title: Food Junkies
programme.desc: Joey Bones selects his favourite moments from the series that cuts straight to the core of London's food scene(n)

programme.title: Coach Trip

programme.title: Coach Trip

programme.title: Coach Trip
programme.desc: Brendan skips down memory lane at L'Estartit, where his international tour-guiding began. A volleyball game proves uncomfortable for one contestant, and there are mixed results when the group tries paddle-boarding, but the tension really mounts at voting time, and someone storms off in a huff(n)

programme.title: Coach Trip
programme.desc: The tourists arrive in Barcelona, Spain, where they are overwhelmed by the architectural majesty of Antoni Gaudi's Sagrada Familia. They then visit an iconic Olympic venue, and two more contestants could be going home when the votes are cast(n)

programme.title: Coach Trip
programme.desc: The coach pulls into Salou in Spain's Catalonia region, and after a messy morning gutting fish for lunch, the group cleans itself up ready for a pole-dancing class. Brendan Sheerin oversees proceedings at the vote, during which one couple are left disappointed(n)

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: The latest research into one of the most mysterious and common human experiences - pain. Breakthroughs have come from studying Jonathan Metz, who cut off his own arm to survive after it became lodged in a furnace, and three generations of an Italian family who do not feel extreme temperatures. There is a report on a new treatment that involves a pioneering computer game, and the impact of moods and emotions on a person's body is explored(n)

With Anne Wiazemsky(n)

There is a report on a new treatment that involves a pioneering computer game, and the impact of moods and emotions on a person's body is explored(n)

programme.title: Girl in the Headlines (1963)
programme.desc: An inspector investigating the murder of a fashion model is led straight into the lair of an international drug-smuggling ring. Crime drama, starring Ian Hendry, Ronald Fraser, Jeremy Brett, Margaret Johnston and Natasha Perry(n)

programme.title: Panic (1963)
programme.desc: A jeweller's assistant is pursued by the police and a violent gang as she struggles to recall details of a shop raid in which she witnessed a murder. Drama, starring Janine Gray(n)

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Andrew White walks through the haunted Coombs Dale in the Peak District and to Glenridding Dodd in the Lake District(n)

programme.title: Kate and William: Inside the Royal Wedding
programme.desc: Documentary focusing on preparations for Prince William and Kate Middleton's wedding at Westminster Abbey on April 29, 2011. The programme includes details of the bride's dress and the couple's honeymoon plans, as well as interviews with friends, old acquaintances from school and former royal staff(n)

programme.title: London Live News
programme.desc: News headlines, travel, weather and debate from across the capital(n)

programme.title: Faking It
programme.desc: Individuals take up the challenge to reinvent themselves completely(n)

programme.title: Trust Me, I'm a Doctor
programme.desc: The doctors are in Glasgow where they discover whether olive oil is healthy using a cutting edge technique. Meanwhile, Dr Chris van Tulleken investigates whether beards are unhygienic, Michael Mosley finds out about meat, and Dr Saleyha Ahsan hears from survivors of sepsis about the warning signs of the little-known condition(n)

programme.title: Silk
programme.desc: Martha is forced to put aside her personal feelings when she is asked to defend a close friend from her youth on trial for a gangland killing. The evidence against him is overwhelming, with his fingerprints and CCTV footage putting him at the scene. But to Martha it all seems a little too convenient. However, is she strong enough to ask her friend the tough questions needed to do her job properly? Billy is shocked when solicitor-turned-supergrass Micky Joy appears looking for redemption, while battle lines are drawn in chambers as an internal tribunal polarises opinion(n)

programme.title: Absolution (1978)
programme.desc: A humourless priest in a Catholic boys' school falls victim to a practical joke played by his favourite student - with tragic consequences for all concerned. Drama, starring Richard Burton, Dominic Guard, Billy Connolly, Sharon Duce and Andrew Keir(n)

They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught. Bradley Walsh presents(n)

programme.desc: Another line-up of contestants answer questions that could change their lives - with lifelines, including Ask the Audience, Phone a Friend and 50-50 available to them if they get stuck(n)

programme.title: Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?
programme.desc: Chris Tarrant invites famous couples to take part in the big-money quiz for charity.
